etymology.description: 歺 (bone remnants) + 又 (hand) -> meet, encounter
etymology.interpretation: The character 𣦻 uses the components 歺 (bone remnants) and 又 (hand) to visually depict a meeting or encounter, possibly symbolizing the act of coming together or confronting something face-to-face. The imagery suggests a hand dealing with something leftover or remaining, which could imply an interaction or meeting.
